title: Ship Loader & Stacker Reclaimer for Baffinland
content:
Project Name: Ship Loader & Stacker Reclaimer for Baffinland Project
Project Code: 4020020 / 4020022
Client: THYSSENKRUPP INDUSTRIAL SOLUTIONS AG, Germany.
Project Contract weight: 4352 Tons (Ship loader – 1981 Tons & Stacker Reclaimer – 2371 Tons)
Description: Scope - Material supply, fabrication, delivery, erection, Installation and cold commissioning for Ship loader and Stacker Reclaimer.
Location: Baffinland, Canada
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works
Market sector: Bulk Material Handling
Status: Completed 2019
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
